steps.t: Celegúien has a bundle of arrows for you to deliver on the crates by her in Echad Andestel. She wants you to carry them to Meredhrandir at the camp of…
Meredhrandir is at Mekhem-bizru, right by the eastern entrance to Moria. You have brought a bundle of arrows to Meredhrandir and should speak to him a…
